//: The Go/ttsc lowering-emit stage of the publish build (scripts/build-package.ts stage-then-bundle): @ttsc/unplugin/bun lowers each src file in the per-file stage, then bun build bundles that emit into dist/. This file's EXISTENCE opts the package into lowering; WHICH stages run is declare-by-depending, resolved HOST-SIDE (§100): ttsc auto-discovery spawns the one owner host from this package's direct @rhombus-std/*.transformer dep, and the host self-selects the full transitive stage set (here the primitive stages inline/nameof/signatureof/mergesynth, reached through primitives.transformer) from its own dependency scan. There is no manual `plugins` array — leaving it absent is what lets auto-discovery run (an explicit array would suppress it). Extends tsconfig.json so the stage inherits the package typecheck profile (and any self-reference condition). Typecheck/lint stay on plain tsc: the authored sugar typechecks with no plugin.
